name: github_list_repo_attestations
description: List artifact attestations for a repository and subject digest (GET /repos/{owner}/{repo}/attestations/{subject_digest}). GitHub requires the subject’s SHA256 digest (`sha256:…`). Uses cursor pagination (`after` / `before` from the `Link` header). Set `all_pages` to follow `next` up to `max_pages` (default **100**). Fine-grained tokens need **attestations:read**. `per_page` defaults to **100** when omitted (GitHub max **100**).

predicate_type.description: Optional filter: provenance, sbom, release, or a custom predicate type string (GitHub API).
